---
title: "GLEAM custom geneset example"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM custom geneset example}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(GLEAM)
```

## Custom named-list genesets

```{r}
custom_gs <- list(
  IFN_custom = c("STAT1", "IRF1", "ISG15", "IFIT3"),
  CYT_custom = c("NKG7", "PRF1", "GZMB", "GNLY")
)

data("pbmc_medium_matrix", package = "GLEAM")
data("pbmc_medium_meta", package = "GLEAM")

sc <- score_signature(
  expr = pbmc_medium_matrix,
  meta = pbmc_medium_meta,
  geneset = custom_gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "mean",
  min_genes = 2,
  verbose = FALSE
)

plot_dot(sc, by = c("group", "celltype"))
```
